name: supertanks-guard
description: Human-in-the-loop guardrails for AI agents: static code scanning, prompt-injection screening, deny-by-default action gating with human approval, and a tamper-evident audit log.
long_description: Gives Claude four safety capabilities: (1) guard_scan_code — AST scan of agent-generated Python before execution; (2) guard_scan_text — prompt-injection screening of untrusted text; (3) guard_gate_action/guard_gate_status — risky actions stay pending until a human approves them from a terminal, approvals expire; (4) guard_audit_log — append-only audit trail with SHA-256 hash chain. Everything runs locally. Scanner and filter are vendored from the open-source Super Tanks governance framework (independent security audit by 7ASecurity in progress).

tools.name: guard_scan_code
tools.description: Statically scan Python code before executing it

tools.name: guard_scan_text
tools.description: Screen untrusted text for prompt injection

tools.name: guard_gate_action
tools.description: Request human approval for a risky action (deny-by-default, TTL)

tools.name: guard_gate_status
tools.description: Check whether a gated action was approved
